records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: How can you rob innocent laborers of their goods?! You should be ashamed of yourself!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How can you rob innocent laborers of their goods?! You should be ashamed of yourself!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How can you rob innocent laborers of their goods?! You should be ashamed of yourself!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I mean, this was technically my property all along
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I mean, this was technically my property all along
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I mean, this was technically my property all along
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How can you say that when you did nothing up until now? Do you know what I had to go through to get here?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How can you say that when you did nothing up until now? Do you know what I had to go through to get here?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How can you say that when you did nothing up until now? Do you know what I had to go through to get here?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Nothing"? Do you know how lonely it is to be the one who has to protect the world?
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Nothing"? Do you know how lonely it is to be the one who has to protect the world?
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Nothing"? Do you know how lonely it is to be the one who has to protect the world?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm pretty sure my financial state is sadder than whatever you're going through. Come on, move aside if you have a heart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm pretty sure my financial state is sadder than whatever you're going through. Come on, move aside if you have a heart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm pretty sure my financial state is sadder than whatever you're going through. Come on, move aside if you have a heart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Say something, Chief! It's unfair of them to just tell us to leave!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Say something, Chief! It's unfair of them to just tell us to leave!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Say something, Chief! It's unfair of them to just tell us to leave!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chief?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chief?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chief?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Daddy, how many nights do I have to sleep to see you again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Daddy, how many nights do I have to sleep to see you again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Daddy, how many nights do I have to sleep to see you again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry, Sigma. It'll only be a hundred nights.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry, Sigma. It'll only be a hundred nights.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry, Sigma. It'll only be a hundred nights.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A hundred nights?! I'm gonna be so bored...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A hundred nights?! I'm gonna be so bored...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A hundred nights?! I'm gonna be so bored...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, you can play with Mone and the other children.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, you can play with Mone and the other children.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you can play with Mone and the other children.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be a good girl!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be a good girl!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be a good girl!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um, Yuppie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um, Yuppie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um, Yuppie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe we can just go home now, since we had enough fun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe we can just go home now, since we had enough fun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe we can just go home now, since we had enough fun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? What are you talking about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh... But Daddy said no.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... But Daddy said no.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh... But Daddy said no.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll do everything I can for you and Credere. So...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll do everything I can for you and Credere. So...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll do everything I can for you and Credere. So...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then it's settled. The chief of the Future Strategy Department has spoken. Let us all return.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then it's settled. The chief of the Future Strategy Department has spoken. Let us all return.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then it's settled. The chief of the Future Strategy Department has spoken. Let us all return.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Noooope.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Noooope.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Noooope.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You expect me to just go back empty-handed? How can you be so shameless?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You expect me to just go back empty-handed? How can you be so shameless?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You expect me to just go back empty-handed? How can you be so shameless?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I assure you, that's not the kind of treasure you're dreaming of.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I assure you, that's not the kind of treasure you're dreaming of.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I assure you, that's not the kind of treasure you're dreaming of.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, but I don't buy that. You're an established liar. I have no reason to believe you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, but I don't buy that. You're an established liar. I have no reason to believe you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, but I don't buy that. You're an established liar. I have no reason to believe you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Besides, if that's not treasure, what are you doing here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Besides, if that's not treasure, what are you doing here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Besides, if that's not treasure, what are you doing here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Things don't always go the way you want them to. It is the same for children and adults alike.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Things don't always go the way you want them to. It is the same for children and adults alike.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Things don't always go the way you want them to. It is the same for children and adults alike.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look back on what you've been through. Did things always go as you planned?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look back on what you've been through. Did things always go as you planned?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look back on what you've been through. Did things always go as you planned?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh. Well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh. Well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh. Well...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Knowing when to give up takes courage, Yuppie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Knowing when to give up takes courage, Yuppie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Knowing when to give up takes courage, Yuppie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've seen the end of countless individuals who were all talk and no substance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've seen the end of countless individuals who were all talk and no substance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've seen the end of countless individuals who were all talk and no substance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All I have is "talk." Don't you think you can let me win this once?
records.m_Talk_DEU: All I have is "talk." Don't you think you can let me win this once?
records.m_Talk_FRA: All I have is "talk." Don't you think you can let me win this once?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do I do? Chief is acting weird and there's no one to help me anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do I do? Chief is acting weird and there's no one to help me anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do I do? Chief is acting weird and there's no one to help me anymore.

Is this really
8g

Is this really
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The ground is shaking. What's going on? Is this an earthquake?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ground is shaking. What's going on? Is this an earthquake?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ground is shaking. What's going on? Is this an earthquake?
